title: DNA extraction for vertebrate tissues
author: Chang Li
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ssyeefw

steps.instruction: 1) Collect and cut muscle tissue of spotted sea bass. 2) The tissue was defrosted and washed with normal saline.Cut about 0.5g tissue. normal saline Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co.
Add STE, SDS (10%), protease K (20mg/ml) to mix. Heat 4-6h at 56℃, and shake in centrifuge at 500 rmp. STE Contributed by users SDS Ambion protease K New England Biolabs 06:00:00, heat Undetermined

1) Add the same volume of Phenol : Chloroform : Isoamylol (25: 24: 1) and mix by gentle inversion for 3-5 min at room temperature. 2) Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at 4℃ and then transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in a new tube. 3) Add the same volume of Chloroform : Isoamylol (24 : 1) and mix by gently inverting for 3-5min at room temperature. 4) Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at 4℃ and then transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in a new tube. Phenol : Chloroform : Isoamylol (25: 24: 1) Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. Chloroform : Isoamylol (24 : 1) Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. 00:05:00, 1) 00:10:00, 2) Undetermined, 2) 00:05:00, 3) 00:10:00, 4) Undetermined, 4)

1) Add equal volume of Isopropanol, and then mix by slowy inverting. 2) Incubate the tube at -20℃ for overnight. 3) Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at 4℃ and discard the supermatant. Isopropanol Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. Undetermined, 2) Undetermined, 3) 00:10:00, 3)

1) Add 1ml of 70% of ethanol, flick the centriguge tube to resuspend the pellet, wash the DNA pellet for 3-5min. 2) Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 5min at 4℃, discard the ethanol. 3) Add 1ml of 70% ethanol and mix gently. Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 5min at 4℃, discard the ethanol. 4) Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 30s, discard the liquid. Air dry the pellet for 5-10min at room temperature. 70% of ethanol Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. 00:05:00, 1) 00:05:00, 2) Undetermined, 2) 00:05:00, 3) Undetermined, 3) 00:00:30, 4) 00:10:00, 4)

Add RNase and 100ul of TE buffer (TE : RNase = 100:1), and then dissolve the pellet at 37℃ for 30min in the Thermomixer. RNase FERMENTAS Inc. TE buffer Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher 00:30:00 Undetermined
